matrix and types.what is matrix?:
A matrix is a rectangular arrangement of numbers
organized in rows and columns.

Rows are horizontal.
Columns are vertical.

Matrix = table of numbers
matrix and types.types:
Row Matrix:
A matrix with only one row.
[ 1  2  3 ]

Column Matrix:
A matrix with only one column.
[ 1 ]
[ 2 ]
[ 3 ]

Square Matrix:
A matrix where rows = columns.
[ 1  2 ]
[ 3  4 ]

Zero Matrix:
A matrix where all elements are zero.
[ 0  0 ]
[ 0  0 ]

Identity Matrix:
A matrix with 1s on the diagonal and 0s elsewhere.
[ 1  0 ]
[ 0  1 ]

Diagonal Matrix:
A matrix where only diagonal elements are non-zero.
[ 5  0  0 ]
[ 0  3  0 ]
[ 0  0  1 ]

Scalar Matrix:
A diagonal matrix where all diagonal elements are equal.
[ 2  0 ]
[ 0  2 ]

Upper Triangular Matrix:
A matrix where elements below the diagonal are zero.
[ 1  2  3 ]
[ 0  4  5 ]
[ 0  0  6 ]

Lower Triangular Matrix:
A matrix where elements above the diagonal are zero.
[ 1  0  0 ]
[ 2  3  0 ]
[ 4  5  6 ]
